sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2024-02-15 07:51
- Distance: 3.7 km
- Moving time: 28:51
- Elapsed time: 33:16
- Elevation gain: 91.2 m
- Average heart rate: 164.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 191 bpm
- Average speed: 7.7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `158.7 bpm`, ranging from `145.0` to `169.9 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `113.9 spm`, with a working range of `106.5` to `157.3 spm` after excluding `72` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `128.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `99.6 spm` (-28.4 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `7:49 /km` across `3.689 km` in `28:51` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:19 /km` and second-half pace was `9:22 /km` (+183 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.5 bpm` average and `191 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `170.2 bpm` in the first half and `159.7 bpm` in the second (-10.5 bpm), which came down late rather than drifting upward.

- Moving time was `28:51` out of `33:16` elapsed (86.7%), which shows a materially stop-start session.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `111` stop segments and `21.8%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `103.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `47.4 m` and `89.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `65.4 m` in the first half and `37.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
